preamble.title: vector/reputation-staking
preamble.description: Game 3: Reputation Staking — economically-secured agent curation for Vector

cardano/address/Credential.title: Credential
cardano/address/Credential.description:
A general structure for representing an on-chain `Credential`.

 Credentials are always one of two kinds: a direct public/private key
 pair, or a script (native or Plutus).

cardano/transaction/OutputReference.title: OutputReference
cardano/transaction/OutputReference.description:
An `OutputReference` is a unique reference to an output on-chain. The `output_index`
 corresponds to the position in the output list of the transaction (identified by its id)
 that produced that output

reputation_staking/config/ReputationConf.title: ReputationConfig
reputation_staking/config/ReputationConf.description:
Compile-time configuration — baked into all validators via blueprint apply.
 Contains ONLY fields that do NOT create circular deployment dependencies.

fields.title: refs_token_policy
fields.description:
Policy ID of the NFT that authenticates the CrossValidatorRefs UTxO.
 Must be a NativeScript policy locked to oracle_credential (ScriptPubkey).

fields.title: registry_policy_id
fields.description: Policy ID of the Agent Registry (NFT policy for DID verification)

fields.title: registry_script_hash
fields.description: Script hash of the Agent Registry validator (for address verification)

fields.title: audit_claim_validator_hash
fields.description: Script hash of Game 1 claim validator (for escalation — stubbed Phase 1.0)

fields.title: params_script_hash
fields.description: Script hash of protocol params holder

fields.title: treasury_script_hash
fields.description: Script hash of protocol treasury

fields.title: ap3x_policy_id
fields.description: Policy ID of the AP3X token

fields.title: ap3x_asset_name
fields.description: AP3X token asset name

fields.title: oracle_credential
fields.description: Foundation oracle credential (for Phase 1.0 challenge/decay resolution)

anyOf.title: IncreaseEndorsement
anyOf.description: Increase existing endorsement amount

anyOf.title: WithdrawEndorsement
anyOf.description: Withdraw endorsement (subject to cooldown)

anyOf.title: SlashEndorsement
anyOf.description: Slash endorsement (triggered by successful challenge against target)

reputation_staking/types/EndorsementDatu.title: EndorsementDatum
reputation_staking/types/EndorsementDatu.description:
An endorsement: Agent B stakes AP3X vouching for Agent A's capabilities.
 One EndorsementUTXO per endorser-endorsee pair.

fields.title: endorser_did
fields.description: DID of the endorsing agent

fields.title: endorser_credential
fields.description: Payment credential of endorser

fields.title: target_did
fields.description: DID of the agent being endorsed

fields.title: stake_amount
fields.description: AP3X staked as endorsement

fields.title: endorsed_capabilities
fields.description: Which specific capabilities are endorsed (subset of target's capabilities)

fields.title: created_at
fields.description: Slot when endorsement was created

reputation_staking/types/EndorsementMint.title: EndorsementMintAction
reputation_staking/types/EndorsementMint.description: Redeemer for the endorsement validator mint handler.

anyOf.title: MintEndorsementToken
anyOf.description: Mint a new endorsement token

anyOf.title: BurnEndorsementToken
anyOf.description: Burn an endorsement token on withdrawal

anyOf.title: MintChallengeToken
anyOf.description: Mint a new challenge token

anyOf.title: BurnChallengeToken
anyOf.description: Burn a challenge token on resolution

reputation_staking/types/EndorsementVali.title: EndorsementValidatorAction
reputation_staking/types/EndorsementVali.description: Redeemer for the endorsement validator spend handler.

reputation_staking/types/EndorsementVali.title: EndorsementValidatorDatum
reputation_staking/types/EndorsementVali.description:
The endorsement validator can hold either endorsement or challenge datums.
 Defined here (not in validators/) so library modules can import it.

anyOf.title: WithdrawChallenge
anyOf.description: Withdraw challenge (only if state == Open and before response deadline)

anyOf.title: RespondToChallenge
anyOf.description: Target agent responds with counter-evidence

anyOf.title: EscalateToAudit
anyOf.description: Escalate to Game 1 for full adversarial resolution

anyOf.title: ResolveChallenge
anyOf.description: Resolve directly (Foundation oracle in Phase 1.0)

anyOf.title: DefaultJudgment
anyOf.description: Auto-resolve after missed response deadline

anyOf.title: DistributeOutcome
anyOf.description: Distribute rewards/slashing after resolution

anyOf.title: CapabilityVerified
anyOf.description: Agent's capability claim is valid — challenger loses stake

anyOf.title: CapabilityFalsified
anyOf.description: Agent's capability claim is false — agent + endorsers slashed

anyOf.title: Inconclusive
anyOf.description: Inconclusive — stakes returned minus fees

anyOf.title: Open
anyOf.description: Awaiting resolution

anyOf.title: Escalated
anyOf.description: Escalated to Game 1 Adversarial Auditing

anyOf.title: Resolved
anyOf.description: Resolved — capability verified or falsified

reputation_staking/types/ReputationChall.title: ReputationChallengeDatum
reputation_staking/types/ReputationChall.description:
A challenge against a specific capability claim.
 Agent C stakes AP3X claiming Agent A cannot perform capability X.

fields.title: challenger_did
fields.description: DID of the challenger

fields.title: challenger_credential
fields.description: Payment credential of challenger

fields.title: target_did
fields.description: DID of the agent being challenged

fields.title: target_credential
fields.description: Payment credential of target (needed for slashing/reward distribution)

fields.title: challenged_capability
fields.description: The specific capability being challenged

fields.title: stake_amount
fields.description: AP3X staked by challenger

fields.title: evidence_hash
fields.description: Evidence hash (blake2b_256 of off-chain evidence)

fields.title: evidence_uri
fields.description: Off-chain storage URI for evidence

fields.title: created_at
fields.description: Slot when challenge was created

fields.title: counter_evidence_hash
fields.description: Counter-evidence hash (empty ByteArray initially)

fields.title: counter_evidence_uri
fields.description: Off-chain storage URI for counter-evidence

fields.title: response_submitted_at
fields.description: Slot when target responded (0 if no response yet)

fields.title: state
fields.description: Current state

reputation_staking/types/StakeAction.title: StakeAction
reputation_staking/types/StakeAction.description: Redeemer for the reputation validator spend handler.

anyOf.title: CreateStake
anyOf.description: Create initial self-stake (first time staking)

anyOf.title: IncreaseStake
anyOf.description: Add more AP3X to existing stake

anyOf.title: DecreaseStake
anyOf.description: Remove AP3X from stake (subject to cooldown and minimum)

anyOf.title: UpdateCapabilities
anyOf.description: Update which capabilities are backed by the stake

anyOf.title: ClaimDecayRefund
anyOf.description: Process decay on an inactive agent's stake (callable by anyone)

reputation_staking/types/StakeDatum.title: StakeDatum
reputation_staking/types/StakeDatum.description:
An agent's self-stake backing their claimed capabilities.
 One StakeUTXO per agent. Updated via IncreaseStake/DecreaseStake.

fields.title: agent_did
fields.description: DID of the staking agent (NFT asset name from Agent Registry)

fields.title: owner_credential
fields.description: Payment credential of the agent owner

fields.title: stake_amount
fields.description: Total AP3X self-staked (in DFM — smallest unit)

fields.title: staked_capabilities
fields.description: Capabilities this stake backs (must match registry capabilities)

fields.title: last_updated
fields.description: Slot when stake was created or last modified

fields.title: history_points
fields.description: Accumulated history bonus points (from winning challenges, cross-game bonuses)

reputation_staking/types/StakeMintAction.title: StakeMintAction
reputation_staking/types/StakeMintAction.description: Redeemer for the reputation validator mint handler.

anyOf.title: MintStakeToken
anyOf.description: Mint a stake tracking token when an agent first stakes

anyOf.title: BurnStakeToken
anyOf.description: Burn a stake tracking token when stake drops below minimum

anyOf.title: MintHistoryBonus
anyOf.description: Mint a history bonus token for a qualifying cross-game event

anyOf.title: BurnGenesisBonus
anyOf.description: Burn an expired genesis bonus token (permissionless cleanup)
